apihelp-helppanelquestionposter-summary: Maaree su'aalaha la soo dhigay qaybta caawinaadda ee isticmaalaha hadda.
apihelp-helppanelquestionposter-paramval: Qaybta "Weydiiso hagahaaga" ee barta hore ee ku cusubka
Qaybta "Weydiiso hagahaaga" ee barta hore ee ku cusubka (magacii hore)
apihelp-helppanelquestionposter-param-re: Cinwaanka khuseeya, haddii la doorto, ee lagu darayo su'aasha.
apierror-mustbeloggedin-helppanelquestio: Waa inaad soo gashid si aad su'aal u weydiiso.
apierror-mustbementored-mentorshipmodule: Ma weydiin kartid su'aal hagahaaga haddii aadan lahayn hage.
